---
title: "Environment variables"
description: "Env vars that influence the installer and the running agent."
---

## Installer (local)

These influence `install.sh` when you pipe it to bash:

| Variable | Effect |
|---|---|
| `AWS_REGION` / `AWS_DEFAULT_REGION` | Sets the deploy region. |
| `AWS_PROFILE` | Uses the named AWS CLI profile. |
| `DEBUG_IN_REPO=1` | Run the installer from the current directory (for pack development). |

## Instance — set by CFN UserData

CloudFormation / Terraform export these into the bootstrap UserData. They're passed to `deploy/bootstrap.sh` which writes them into `/tmp/loki-pack-config.json`:

| Env var | CFN parameter | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `PACK_NAME` | `PackName` | Which pack to install |
| `PROFILE_NAME` | `ProfileName` | Which profile |
| `BEDROCK_REGION` | `BedrockRegion` | Bedrock region (distinct from deploy region if you want) |
| `DEFAULT_MODEL` | `DefaultModel` | Per-pack default model (threaded automatically) |
| `MODEL_MODE` | `ModelMode` | `bedrock` / `litellm` / `api-key` |
| `LITELLM_BASE_URL` | `LiteLLMBaseUrl` | LiteLLM proxy URL |
| `LITELLM_API_KEY` | `LiteLLMApiKey` | LiteLLM API key |
| `LITELLM_MODEL` | `LiteLLMModel` | LiteLLM model name |
| `PROVIDER_API_KEY` | `ProviderApiKey` | Direct Anthropic key (model-mode=api-key) |
| `KIRO_FROM_SECRET` | `KiroFromSecret` | Secrets Manager id/arn for Kiro API key (kiro-cli headless) |
| `GW_PORT` | `OpenClawGatewayPort` | OpenClaw gateway port (default 3001) |

## Instance — per-pack runtime

Once the agent is running, pack-specific env vars are set in shell profiles:

<Tabs>
  <Tab title="openclaw">
    ```
    OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:3001
    OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=<auto-generated>
    AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=<from pack config>
    ```
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="claude-code">
    ```
    ANTHROPIC_MODEL=us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6
    ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL=us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0
    AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=<from pack config>
    CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1
    ```
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="codex-cli">
    Codex reads `~/.codex/config.toml` (managed by the pack) and optionally `OPENAI_API_KEY` at runtime. No env vars set by the pack itself.
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="kiro-cli">
    ```
    KIRO_API_KEY=<from ~/.kiro/env if configured>
    ```
    `~/.kiro/env` is sourced from `~/.bash_profile`; permissions are 0600.
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="bedrockify-backed packs (hermes, pi, ironclaw, nemoclaw)">
    ```
    OPENAI_API_BASE=http://localhost:8090/v1
    OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8090/v1
    # pack-specific model env (LLM_MODEL for ironclaw, HERMES_MODEL for hermes, etc.)
    ```
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

## Precedence

1. **Explicit flag** on `install.sh` (e.g. `--profile builder`) wins over
2. **Env var** (e.g. `AWS_REGION`) wins over
3. **Pack manifest default** (`packs/<pack>/manifest.yaml`)

For pack-internal values, `pack_config_get <key> <default>` reads from `/tmp/loki-pack-config.json` first, then falls back to the provided default.
